chapter_title.en: Chapter 113 – Clearing the womb of the slave girl

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْجَارِيَةِ الَّتِي لَمْ تَبْلُغِ الْمَحِيضَ وَ يُخَافُ عَلَيْهَا الْحَبَلُ فَقَالَ يَسْتَبْرِئُ رَحِمَهَا الَّذِي يَبِيعُهَا بِخَمْسٍ وَ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةً وَ الَّذِي يَشْتَرِيهَا بِخَمْسٍ وَ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةً .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from one of his companions, form Aban Bin Uman, from Rabie Bin Al Qasim who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the slave girl who had not reached menstruation, and he feared of the pregnancy upon her. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should clear her womb, the one who sold her, by forty five nights, and the one who buys her, by forty five days’.
